column14: M2 REVISED TO REMOVE NEGATIVE Q PANEL D/S OF BOULDER AT 25.5M. HIGHER VELOCITIES ON EITHER SIDE OF BOULDER WERE NOT MEASURED, RESULTING IN UNDERESTIMATION OF Q. FILE REVISED IN FLOWTRACKER 2 PROGRAM. ORIGINAL Q= 4.91CMS. ONE PANEL IS 14% Q. REVISED RESULTS MOSTLY LINE UP WITH 2020-09-24 QM AT NEARLY SAME HG. SHIFT IS APPLIED TO JUST WITHIN 5% DUE TO PANEL WITH 14% Q. - KF UPDATED MMT END/MEAN TIMES TO INCLUDE INSERTED PANEL AT 11:50. NO MGH CHANGE REQUIRED. - RV 2022.03.03 First measurement (M1) had consistent angle errors due to misaligned sensor on wading rod. Considered invalid and second measurement (M2) was completed and will be used. Both sections (80m d/s and 5m u/s of gauge) are very bouldery, unsure if a better option exists. Reset HG to 0.982m at 10:18pst. Mid-section

ORIGINAL FLOWTRACKER MMT HAD SOME ERRORS DUE TO USER ERROR MADE BY TECH.  CORRECTIONS TO ORIGINAL DISCHARGE MEASUREMENT WERE CORRECTED IN A SPREADSHEET.  Measurement collected at gauge, considered poor quality due to numerous errors made by the tech being unfamiliar with the instrumentation. Manually corrected paper note due to numerous errors in widths and depths. Plots 12.5 % off of base curve 27. However BM tie in seems to indicate that BM 1 (control may have dropped 0.017 m due to fire) . If future tie ins confirm this movement and assuming BM 2 is used the MGH would be 1.131 m and the measurement would plot 7.2 % to the right of base curve 27.
